Home/Cookies

Legal

Cookie policy

We use cookies and similar storage to run SourceA and, with your consent, to improve the experience. No ad-network trackers.

Categories

Strictly necessarySign-in, security, consent storage — always on.
AnalyticsAnonymous usage to improve pages — opt in.
FunctionalFeedback widget and UX helpers — opt in.

Cookie & storage table

Name Category Duration Purpose
sourcea-cookie-consent-v1 Necessary 12 months Stores your cookie choices
sourcea-platform-session-v1 Necessary Session / local Forge Terminal sign-in state
sourcea-pulse-session-v1 Analytics Session Anonymous analytics session id

How to control cookies

Use the banner on first visit, the Cookies floating button, or open preferences. You can also clear site data in your browser settings.

More information

See our Privacy policy for how we process personal data. Questions: privacy@sourcea.app.
